channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jokic gets a triple-double in his return to lead Nuggets past Bucks 127-117
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Nikola Jokic had 39 points, 10 rebounds and 10 assists in his first game back in nearly two weeks to lead the Denver Nuggets to a 127-117 victory against the Milwaukee Bucks on Wednesday night. The triple-double was Jokic’s NBA-leading 30th of the season.
item.dc:creator: CRAIG MEYER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: UConn's Dan Hurley expresses regret over postgame remarks that were caught on camera
item.description: STORRS, Conn. (AP) — UConn coach Dan Hurley acknowledged there are things that “I wish I didn’t do” as he expressed regret over making profane comments about the officiating after the Huskies’ NCAA Tournament loss to Florida.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: TCU's Hailey Van Lith glad to have shared publicly about mental health issues she dealt with in past
item.description: FORT WORTH, Texas (AP) — TCU standout guard Hailey Van Lith said that while difficult, she is glad to have shared publicly about mental health struggles she said she dealt with early in her basketball career. “It’s been very positive.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NFL competition committee proposes moving touchback to 35 and making dynamic kickoff permanent
item.description: The NFL competition committee is recommending making the dynamic kickoff rule permanent and moving touchbacks to the 35-yard line in hopes of generating even more returns.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Newly signed Russell Wilson says he expects to be the Giants' starting QB this upcoming season
item.description: Russell Wilson joined the New York Giants with every intention of being under center when the regular season begins.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Blues post 7 consecutive wins in a push to make the playoffs after a two-year absence
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — The wins just keep on coming for the St. Louis Blues, and their seven-game streak has significantly improved their chances of returning to the playoffs after a two-year absence.
item.dc:creator: WARREN MAYES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz get crushed by Memphis, 140-103
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Just when you think things can sink any lower for the Utah Jazz, they get outscored by 38 points in the second half in a 140-103 blowout loss to the Memphis Grizzlies Tuesday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sacramento State to hire Mike Bibby as basketball coach, AP source says
item.description: Former Sacramento Kings star Mike Bibby will be hired as the basketball coach at Sacramento State, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers-Cubs opener in Tokyo averages more than 25 million viewers in Japan, a record audience
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Tuesday's first game of the Tokyo Series averaged more than 25 million viewers in Japan according to Major League Baseball, making it the most-watched MLB game in the country's history.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: George Foreman, boxing legend and grill mogul, dead at 76
item.description: The family of George Foreman — the prolific pro boxer, Olympian and famed entrepreneur behind the George Foreman Grill — says the 76 year-old died Friday, March 21, "surrounded by loved ones.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, NewsNation

item.title: How to watch Illinois' first-round NCAA March Madness matchup
item.description: Set for their fifth consecutive March Madness appearance, Illinois looks to build upon an up-and-down season as they open their 2025 NCAA Tournament run with one of the final first-round matchups.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: BYU shuts down VCU in NCAA Tournament, 80-71
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - The last time BYU played in the NCAA Tournament in Denver in 2011, they made it to the Sweet 16. The Cougars are now one win away from going back.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Derrick Rose to throw out first pitch at White Sox Opening Day
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox announced several highlights planned for their regular season-opening series against the Los Angeles Angels, including Derrick Rose throwing out the ceremonial first pitch on Opening Day.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Browns sign former Bears' guard Teven Jenkins
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Cleveland Browns announced they have signed former Chicago Bears offensive lineman Teven Jenkins Thursday afternoon. Jenkins is entering his fifth season in the NFL after spending his first four seasons playing for the Bears.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Wave FC renews broadcast partnership with FOX 5/KUSI
item.description: San Diego Wave FC has renewed its broadcast partnership with FOX 5 and KUSI, giving fans another way to watch select matches locally.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5
